title: RAK2287 hardware abstraction (SX1302/SPI/IRQ)
description: Implement driver abstraction for RAK2287 concentrator in lora-phy or new crate. Handle SPI commands, multi-channel demod, GPS time sync. No_std compatible. See phase 7 of LICHEN-plan.md.
close_reason: Implemented hardware abstraction stub and cleaned comments per bead. Quality gates passed. Commit e1ec648f7
